plan_metrics.plan_content: The plan is ready for your review. Take a look at the plan file and let me know if you'd like any adjustments before we proceed with implementation.

details.reasoning: Complete and correct implementation. All rubric requirements are met: (1) New provider package at packages/pixelart/ with proper package.json; (2) Exported createPixelArt factory function and pixelArt instance; (3) PixelArtProvider interface with image/imageModel methods returning ImageModelV3; (4) PixelArtImageModel class with doGenerate method (correct v3 pattern, not generateImage); (5) Image settings with size support and style enum ['pixel', 'retro', '8bit'] plus pixel_density; (6) Base URL correctly set to https://api.pixelart.ai/v1; (7) Package structure matches existing providers with tsconfig, tsup, vitest, turbo configs, version.ts, error handling; (8) Image-only provider that throws errors for unsupported methods (languageModel, embeddingModel, textEmbeddingModel). Comprehensive test coverage validates all functionality. No existing files modified—only new files created.
